title: Apollo Global Settings
description: Global Apollo user/app settings persisted at data/settings.json. Tracks chat defaults, the default storage backend, optional global CBL location, and the recent-projects list shown in My Files (see PLAN_PROJECT_BOOTSTRAP §6.1).

default_model.description: Identifier of the default model used by the chat service

default_backend.description: Backend used for newly initialized projects unless overridden in the wizard

cblite_storage_root.description: Optional absolute path used when location_mode='global'; null = use ~/.apollo/cblite/

recent_projects.description: Most-recently-opened Apollo projects, newest first; deduplicated by path

path.description: Absolute path to the project root

last_opened_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the most recent open
